summary: Completed testing of HyperServe auth flows and tenant creation. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All auth pages working correctly with email-only login (NO phone fields). Found UI bug in EnhancedCreateTenant form - missing address/town fields and field name mismatch.

ui_bugs.issue: Form UI has 'contact_email' and 'contact_phone' fields but formData state has 'mobile_number', 'business_name', 'address', 'town'. Missing address and town input fields in UI.

action_items: Fix EnhancedCreateTenant.js: Replace contact_email/contact_phone with mobile_number and add address/town input fields to match backend model
critical_code_review_comments: EnhancedCreateTenant.js lines 143-163: UI fields (contact_email, contact_phone) don't match formData state (mobile_number, business_name, address, town)
Missing address and town input fields in the Create Tenant form UI

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All auth flows working, minor UI bug in tenant creation form

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_NewFieldsTenant via API to verify backend accepts new fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth endpoints working: /api/auth/login, /api/auth/send-email-otp, /api/auth/verify-email-otp, /api/auth/reset-password. Email OTP is MOCKED (returns OTP in response). /login route removed - redirects to home. EnhancedCreateTenant form needs field name fixes.

backend_tests.email_password_login: PASS - Super admin login works with admin@hyperserve.com/admin123
backend_tests.verify_email_otp: PASS - Logs in user after OTP verification
backend_tests.tenant_creation_with_new_fields: PASS - Backend accepts mobile_number, business_name, address, town

frontend_tests.admin_login_page: PASS - No phone fields, email/password only
frontend_tests.enhanced_create_tenant: PARTIAL - Form loads but has field name mismatch

mocked_apis.email_otp: OTP returned in API response for testing - no real email sending
